en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Italy Register of Enterprises Applicability Assessment

In Italy, all companies must obtain a Register of Enterprises Certificate to certify registration in the national Business Register maintained by the local Chambers of Commerce. The certificate acts as official proof of a business’s legal existence and compliance. The Register of Enterprises Certificate is kept by the network of the Chambers of Commerce and registration takes place in the same way as for the National Business Register.\n
Does your company perform work in Italy and maintain business entity certificates?
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Italian legislation.
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from needing business entity certificates in Italy.
The company is a foreign company that is solely engaged in preparatory or exploratory initiatives in Italy and has registered with the Economic and Administrative Repertory (REA).
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing a business entity certificate in Italy.
